rationale: Acting on Review 2 yields a better PR under reuse by deleting the pointless rfl includeRight_apply (def=def, Mathlib already @[simp]) plus map_toAlgHom/map_toCoalgHom/map_tmul (direct Bialgebra.TensorProduct specializations with g:=id) and inlining antipode_tmul, while Review 1 incorrectly claims "no outright duplicates." The private-helper and upstreaming suggestions are debatable but do not outweigh the net win from removing real duplication grounded in the diff.
